description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating dark and light horizontal stripes, giving it a visually striking, high-contrast appearance. The sides of the block are solid black, creating a sharp boundary between the striped top and the rest of the structure. The stripes are evenly spaced and run parallel to the shorter edge of the block, suggesting a deliberate, manufactured design. The surface texture appears slightly rough, typical of cut or cast stone, with a matte finish that reduces glare. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering, indicating it is relatively new or well-maintained. The block is robust and heavy, suitable for use as an urban obstacle or barrier in public spaces.
description: A rectangular stone block with a striped, high-contrast top and solid black sides, featuring a rough, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horizontal striped pattern on the top and the solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical orientation of the stripes and the solid black side face.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same horizontal striped top and black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing vertical stripes and a solid black side face.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative or protective barrier
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or placed directly on a leveled surface
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering or erosion; the surface appears clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
